title: Alumni Voices: How a Montclair Information Technology Graduate Built a Career at UPS
description: Wondering what career paths are possible with a degree in IT? Meet Kaan Esendemir '18, whose visit to a Montclair career fair led to a role at a Fortune 50 company.

title: The top AI fear for 6,000 tech pros isn't losing their jobs - it's more work for the same pay
description: Most tech professionals wouldn't recommend their own role to someone entering the industry today. Includes commentary from Kaan Esendemir on AI workload pressure in enterprise roles.
